description: Letter to Berakhot Abū Ṭāhir. In Hebrew (first ~20 lines) and Judaeo-Arabic (last ~5 lines). Consists almost entirely of blessings. The sender asks for an unspecified favor in the last preserved line. On verso the name of the sender may appear (מפתרץ מחבתה . . . אלחבר צהר רבינו אברהם זל), i.e., a ḥaver who is the in-law of the late Rabbenu Avraham. A few letters from the name may still be legible before "al-ḥaver." Join: Oded Zinger.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
